claim: The Japanese title '蝦夷島奇觀' is presented without translation or transliteration in the main text, although it is followed by '(Ezoshima kikan)'. It might be beneficial to provide the transliteration immediately after the Japanese characters for clarity.

claim: The 'Year' for Chiri (1953–62) uses a hyphen. A common convention for publication ranges is an en dash (–) or 'to'.

all_issues.issue: The 'Year' for Chiri (1953–62) uses a hyphen. A common convention for publication ranges is an en dash (–) or 'to'.

claim: The parenthetical note '(SA contrast)' appears to be an internal note about the source's content rather than a description of the source type itself. It might be better integrated into the prose or removed if redundant.

all_issues.issue: The parenthetical note '(SA contrast)' appears to be an internal note about the source's content rather than a description of the source type itself. It might be better integrated into the prose or removed if redundant.
